description: Initial render of a 10k-line synthetic Rust file (flat fns + a 10-level deeply-nested fn): load into the ropey TextBuffer + run the tree-sitter highlight pass; measure load -> first highlighted-span emission.
Scroll a 10k-line buffer to the last line; measure viewport-move -> the correct last line appearing in the virtualized egui layout (only the visible window painted).
Find a token that appears 200 times across a 10k-line buffer (collect 200 match spans), then replace-all; assert exactly 200 replacements. Two budgets: search + replace.
Multi-cursor insert at 1000 cursor positions simultaneously via CursorSet::insert_at_all; assert all 1000 positions carry the inserted text.
Memory budget: load the 10k-line buffer + run a highlight pass; measure process RSS delta (median of 3 runs via sysinfo). Budget is a delta ceiling.

Large-codebase index: write 500 synthetic Rust files (~200 lines each) to a temp dir and run the code-nav workspace indexer; assert symbol_count >= 500. BINDS handshake_core code-nav (CodeNavClient) -> requires live managed PostgreSQL.

Minimap glyph layout for a 10k-line buffer via Minimap::compute_row_colors; measure layout time; assert the minimap covers all 10000 buffer lines (row count tracks line count via the compression ratio).
LSP diagnostics overlay: inject 500 diagnostic GutterMarkers into the panel diagnostic store; measure the store/overlay pass; assert all 500 are recorded (none dropped).

Load a 1000-paragraph-block rich document (POST then GET /knowledge/documents); measure network round-trip + native block-tree build. BINDS handshake_core knowledge documents -> requires live managed PostgreSQL.

Scroll through a loaded 1000-block rich document: drive the virtual scroll from block 0 to 999 across 100 viewport steps; assert no layout panic. BINDS handshake_core -> requires live managed PostgreSQL for the loaded doc.
Find in a rich document with 500 'FINDME' occurrences (every other block); collect all 500 spans. BINDS handshake_core -> requires live managed PostgreSQL.

Save a 1000-block rich document (PUT /knowledge/documents/{id}/save); measure round-trip; assert the saved version advances (updated_at changed). BINDS handshake_core + EventLedger -> requires live managed PostgreSQL.

Transclusion chain, 50 hops: resolve a 50-deep chain via the native cycle-aware resolver (visited HashSet) calling GET /loom/blocks/{id}/transclusion recursively. The LIVE 50-hop resolution requires PG; the cycle-detection RESOLVER LOGIC (cyclic-5 -> 'cycle_detected', no panic/infinite-loop) is proven NOW frontend-only.
Memory budget for a loaded + parsed 1000-block rich document; measure process RSS delta (median of 3). BINDS handshake_core for the loaded doc -> requires live managed PostgreSQL.

Export projection of a 1000-block document (GET /knowledge/documents/{id}/projection?format=html); measure server response; assert returned HTML length > 50000 chars. BINDS handshake_core -> requires live managed PostgreSQL.

Graph load, 1000 nodes (~2000 edges): GET /loom/graph/global; measure query time only (block creation not counted); assert node_count >= 1000. BINDS handshake_core loom graph -> requires live managed PostgreSQL.

Graph render layout: run the native force-directed layout (LoomGraphView::set_graph + step_layout to convergence) and measure one full layout-to-stable pass. Frontend-only native impl (no PG) -> runs + PASSES NOW. TYPED LIMITATION: the contract names a 1000-node graph, but LoomGraphView HARD-CAPS the laid-out set at NODE_CAP=200 (graph_view.rs:63; naive O(n^2) repulsion). The test synthesizes the full 1000-node/2000-edge target, reads the ACTUAL laid-out count back (==NODE_CAP=200), asserts the cap + that total_available==1000 (truncation notice), and measures+records the REAL 200-node laid-out count. The 1000-node native budget is architecturally unreachable through this surface and is NOT proven here; raising the cap (e.g. Barnes-Hut) is a separate force-layout-scaling work item.

Tag hub query, 5000 blocks tagged: query the tag hub for a tag attached to 5000 blocks (GET /loom/tags/{tag}/blocks); measure query only; assert hit_count == 5000. BINDS handshake_core loom tags -> requires live managed PostgreSQL.

Search index, 5000 blocks: POST /loom/search-v2 with a query matching ~100 blocks; measure response; assert hits length between 50 and 200. BINDS handshake_core search-v2 -> requires live managed PostgreSQL.
Folder tree, 200 folders (1000 child blocks): GET /loom/folders; measure response; assert folder_count == 200. BINDS handshake_core loom folders -> requires live managed PostgreSQL.
